canonical_definition: An In-Context Learning (ICL) based safety alignment protocol that uses a system prompt and three curated stylistic examples to enhance model safety without fine-tuning.
papers: Durable Quantization Conditioned Misalignment Attack on Large Language Models
Is In-Context Learning Sufficient for Instruction Following in LLMs?
